hero.eyebrow: ZIAN AI CONCEPTS — AI · Creative Tech · Engineering
hero.headline: Designing intelligence.
hero.sub: I build interfaces, agents and creative tools at the intersection of AI and motion — a one-person studio shipping work that thinks, reacts, and feels alive.

lines: Software should feel like it's thinking with you,
Every pixel, every motion, every model decision
is a chance to make machines feel human.

work.title: Things I've built lately.
work.intro: A rotating selection of recent experiments, products and commissioned work — across AI agents, generative interfaces and creative R&D.
work.endLine: Full case studies on request — drop me a line.

cases.title: Neural Compositions
cases.blurb: A generative audio system exploring latent musical spaces through LLM-driven composition.

cases.title: Synthetic Studio
cases.blurb: AI-powered brand identity: logo synthesis, type selection and colour system generation in real time.

cases.title: Atlas of Latent Space
cases.blurb: Interactive WebGL visualisation of high-dimensional embedding spaces for model interpretability.

cases.title: Quiet Machines
cases.blurb: Ambient interface experiment: an AI that responds to attention and context, not clicks.

cases.title: Soft Protocol
cases.blurb: Conceptual protocol for decentralised creative collaboration between humans and AI agents.

capabilities.title: What I do.
capabilities.intro: Engineering and design rolled into one practice — I move from research to production without handoffs.

items.title: AI engineering
items.body: Agents, RAG systems, evals, and production LLM pipelines built with Claude, GPT and open models.

items.title: Creative coding
items.body: WebGL, shaders, generative graphics and motion systems — performant, expressive, original.

items.title: Concept & strategy
items.body: From first idea to working prototype — naming, narrative, system thinking and product framing.

items.title: Interaction design
items.body: Interfaces that respond, breathe, and feel intentional. Detail-obsessed micro-interactions and motion craft.

steps.title: Frame
steps.body: We start with the real question — not the deliverable. I dig into the problem, the constraints and the people involved.

steps.title: Sketch
steps.body: Working prototypes within days, not weeks. I build in the browser, in code, with real data — never in slides.

steps.title: Sharpen
steps.body: Iterate against reality. Real users, real performance budgets, real tradeoffs. Cut everything that doesn't earn its place.

steps.title: Ship
steps.body: Production-grade craft from day one. Then maintain, measure, evolve. Software is a relationship, not a delivery.

aiDemo.title: Experience intelligence.
aiDemo.intro: Ask me anything. I answer directly — no form, no waiting room.
suggestions: What does ZIAN AI CONCEPTS do?
Which AI models do you use?
What sets you apart from an agency?
aiDemo.disclaimer: Questions are processed locally and never stored.
aiDemo.liveDisclaimer: Prompts are sent directly to the Ollama endpoint, never to third parties.

replies: ZIAN AI CONCEPTS is a one-person studio for AI engineering, creative coding and interaction design. I build interfaces, agents and generative systems — from concept to production.
A collaboration typically starts with a short kick-off call. We then iterate closely: I deliver working prototypes fast rather than long specification documents.
I mainly use Claude by Anthropic and open-source models via Ollama — depending on the use-case. For production applications I prefer Claude for its reliability and reasoning strength.
Unlike an agency, there are no account managers or handoffs. You work directly with me — meaning faster decisions, less overhead and more product coherence.
mock.fallback: Great question! I'm André Zimmermann, AI engineer and designer at ZIAN AI CONCEPTS. Feel free to reach out directly if you'd like to know more.
